8cf51dda | I'm going back to our previous conversation about the grant aim page on molecular subtypes and endometrial cancer. Can you remind me what were the three objectives we outlined for the project?

8cf51dda | the project | objective | validate the identified subtypes using an independent cohort of endometrial cancer samples and investigate their clinical and biological significance using a combination of functional and bioinformatic approaches
8cf51dda | the project | objective | identify molecular subtypes of endometrial cancer using a combination of genomic and transcriptomic approaches
